_comment: Shared benchmark workload manifest. Generated by `zig build bench`. Each language reproduces these payloads (same record schema + fixed PRNG semantics) and must match byte_len and sha256 before its throughput counts.

payloads.name: stock_quotes
payloads.description: Level-1 equity quotes: symbol, exact decimal bid/ask, f64 last, volume, timestamp

payloads.name: geo_points
payloads.description: Geospatial fixes: f64 lat/lon/elevation, place name, timestamp

payloads.name: tweets
payloads.description: Social posts: u64 id, handle, variable-length text, timestamp, like/retweet counts

payloads.name: blockchain_txs
payloads.description: Ledger transactions: 32-byte hash, 20-byte addresses, arbitrary-precision wei value, gas/nonce, timestamp

payloads.name: int_stream
payloads.description: Flat stream of i64 — integer codec in isolation (no container framing)

payloads.name: string_stream
payloads.description: Flat stream of short strings — framing/escaping in isolation

payloads.name: nested_doc
payloads.description: Nested map/array documents — recursion + canonical map ordering
